summary: CRE Board Loading Fix VERIFIED - Page no longer stuck on 'Loading...' state. All fixes working correctly: Promise.allSettled in frontend, asyncio.gather in backend, skeleton loading state implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend fix VERIFIED: CREBoard.jsx lines 104-155 uses Promise.allSettled to parallelize API calls
Backend fix VERIFIED: operations.py lines 77-146 uses asyncio.gather to parallelize MongoDB queries
Skeleton loading state VERIFIED: CREBoard.jsx lines 510-537 shows animated skeleton instead of plain 'Loading...' text

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 core tests passed, 2 errors due to rate limiting)

context_for_next_testing_agent: CRE Board loading fix verified working. The page now loads correctly without getting stuck on 'Loading...' state. All dashboard metric cards, tabs, Payment Collection Requests section, and Project Stages section are working correctly.

cre_dashboard_api.details: GET /api/cre/dashboard returns 200 with correct metrics (draft_count, pending_payment_count, etc.)

cre_new_deals_api.details: GET /api/cre/new-deals returns 200 with list of deals

dashboard_metric_cards.details: All 5 cards visible: Draft (0), Pending Payment (1), Payment Verified (0), In Planning (0), Approved (0)

tabs_functionality.details: All 7 tabs clickable: New Deals, All Projects, Draft, Pending Payment, Payment Received, In Planning, Approved

project_stages_section.details: All 8 stages visible: Drawing Stage, Yet to Start, Foundation, Basement, SS-Brick Work, SS-Plastering, Finishing, Handover

skeleton_loading_state.details: Skeleton animation shows during loading instead of plain 'Loading...' text

verification_summary.issue_description: CRE Board was perpetually stuck on 'Loading...' state
verification_summary.root_cause: Sequential API calls taking ~7s total with no visual feedback
fix_applied: Frontend: Promise.allSettled to run API calls in parallel
Backend: asyncio.gather to run MongoDB queries in parallel
UI: Skeleton loading animation instead of plain text
verification_summary.verification_result: FIXED - Page loads correctly in ~3.5s with proper skeleton animation
